description: CompositionBlue round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, blue fabric tape on the inseam of the neckline, vented hem, with graphic print on the frontFittingRegularWash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove immediately Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Spirituality hits a new high with this blue tee from myntra!
